overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character riding an elevator down to a futuristic city street, then walking through a vibrant cyberpunk urban environment with neon signs, dense crowds, and futuristic vehicles. The clip transitions from an enclosed elevator to open plazas, covered walkways, and busy commercial intersections.

events.description: elevator doors open revealing outdoor city plaza with bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: riding elevator down from upper floor, watching news screens on the walls

entered.detail: four digital screens displaying news broadcasts with male anchors
vertical control panel with yellow arrow indicators and floor buttons
rolling metal security grate that opens to reveal the city outside
fluorescent tube lighting along the elevator ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a descending elevator with artificial lighting and news screens on the walls. The metal security gate opens at the end, transitioning to the outdoor environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city plaza with parked police vehicle

events.description: exiting shaded building interior into bright midday sunlight
turning right to navigate around the parked police cruiser

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator building and walking across the sunlit plaza toward a large commercial building entrance

notable_agents.action: futuristic police cruiser with pink neon decals parked in the plaza

entered.detail: white and black police car with pink neon police markings and light bar
tall black digital sign displaying LCC 896 and number 10 in white
large orange building with APARTMENT text and geometric white patterns
tall palm tree in planter on the plaza sidewalk
wide concrete plaza surface with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The character exits the elevator into a bright sunlit plaza with a futuristic police cruiser parked prominently. The camera walks past the vehicle toward a large building with a digital sign reading LCC 896, surrounded by orange apartment buildings and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with graffiti and broken vehicle

events.description: entering covered underpass area with artificial lighting and graffiti-covered walls
passing close to mechanic inspecting broken car, temporarily blocking left side of view

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered walkway passing a broken down car and graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: mechanic in yellow boots and green vest inspecting engine of broken green car

entered.detail: vintage green car with hood open and engine exposed, appearing broken down
wall covered in purple and green graffiti tags and street art
steam or smoke rising from a vent on the ground
large concrete blocks lining the right side of the walkway
concrete ceiling of the overpass with fluorescent strip lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered underpass with graffiti-covered walls and a broken green car being inspected by a mechanic. Steam rises from vents in the ground as the camera walks beneath the concrete overpass structure.

events.description: beginning to cross the yellow-striped crosswalk with a crowd of pedestrians
red sedan drives through the intersection ahead of the crossing pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the busy intersection with a dense crowd, navigating between pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving through the intersection crosswalk
yellow taxi cab passing through the cross street

entered.detail: wide pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
multi-level highway structure curving overhead with vehicles
tall buildings covered in large digital billboards and neon signage
traffic signal showing red for vehicles
dark red four-door sedan driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character exits the underpass into a dense crowd crossing a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes. Elevated highways curve overhead while a red sedan drives through the intersection, and neon-covered skyscrapers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with street vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: approaching street vendor area with outdoor cafe seating and food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk past food vendors and pedestrians browsing stalls

notable_agents.action: vendor in suit standing at food stall with green tables and umbrella

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying PASSION with a portrait image
food vendor stall with green tables and canvas umbrella
entrance to underground metro with illuminated signage
green stools and tables outside a cafe
elevated walkway crossing above the street level

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a dense commercial sidewalk with street food vendors, outdoor cafe seating, and a large PASSION billboard. The metro station entrance is visible as the camera moves through the crowd beneath the elevated highways and neon signs of the cyberpunk city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the sterile confinement of a descending elevator into the sprawling, neon-lit chaos of a futuristic metropolis. It begins inside the lift amidst artificial lighting and news screens, moving forward as the security gate opens to reveal a bright, sunlit plaza featuring a parked police cruiser and orange apartment buildings. The camera then transitions from the open square into a gritty, semi-covered underpass where steam rises from ground vents and graffiti lines the walls beside a broken green car. As the character exits the underpass, the environment expands into a dense urban intersection filled with crowds, yellow crosswalks, and curving elevated highways beneath towering skyscrapers. The movement finally flows along a crowded commercial sidewalk past street food vendors and a large PASSION billboard, heading toward a metro station entrance under the glow of city neon.
